page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.12xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by 48 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores running at 2.5 GHz. It features 368.0 GB of system memory, providing 7.67 GB per core. The instance is equipped with four NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs, delivering a combined 128 GB of VRAM. It does not include local storage, requiring external network-attached storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps under the KVM hypervisor.

Benchmark data reveals a clear divergence between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core CPU performance is weak, scoring 1110.4 in stress-ng tests, and single-threaded gzip compression is poor at 19.36 GB/sec. However, multi-core scaling is average, with stress-ng multi-core performance reaching 35520.27 and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression at 147.7 GB/sec. Memory bandwidth is average, measuring 98.85 GB/sec for large-block read operations and 47.39 GB/sec for write operations. Redis SET operations perform at an average rate of 33.18 million operations per second, while static web serving throughput is 23.02 GB/sec.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the hardware profile is defined by its high density of GPU resources and dedicated CPU cores rather than raw single-core speed. The absence of local storage represents a tradeoff, as users must factor in the cost and latency of external storage volumes. This server is configured for workloads that leverage parallel GPU processing and multi-threaded CPU execution, such as deep learning training, GPU-accelerated database queries, scientific simulations, and parallel data processing pipelines, rather than single-threaded applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.12xlarge is an x86_64 GPU-accelerated server featuring 48 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores operating at 2.5 GHz, paired with 368.0 GB of RAM. The hardware profile is highlighted by four NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs providing a total of 128 GB of VRAM. It lacks local storage and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. Benchmark results indicate weak single-core CPU performance, with a stress-ng single-core score of 1110.4 and poor single-threaded compression speeds. Conversely, multi-core and memory performance are average, with stress-ng multi-core reaching 35520.27 and large-block memory read bandwidth at 98.85 GB/sec. This instance is suited for parallel processing tasks, deep learning, and GPU-accelerated workloads that can utilize its multi-GPU configuration and dedicated core allocation, while relying on external storage solutions.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.12xlarge is an x86_64 server with 48 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 368 GB RAM, and 4 NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs with 128 GB VRAM, designed for GPU-accelerated parallel workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.12xlarge features 48 dedicated Intel cores, 368 GB RAM, and 4 NVIDIA V100 GPUs for parallel computing workloads.
tagline: A dedicated multi-GPU server featuring four NVIDIA Volta V100 graphics processors and substantial memory for parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: Four NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs providing 128 GB of total VRAM.
48 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores with 368 GB of RAM.
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth under KVM virtualization.
No local storage, requiring external network-attached storage volumes.
Average multi-core performance contrasted with weak single-core execution.
Suited for deep learning, scientific simulations, and GPU-accelerated databases.
